zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland於1103年出生在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素時，他的父親Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton41歲，母親Agnes de Surdeval33歲。他和Agnes d’Aumâle至少有4個兒子。他去世於1143年3月20日在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland于1103年出生在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓 卡素时，他的父亲Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton41岁，母亲Agnes de Surdeval33岁。他和Agnes d’Aumâle至少有4个儿子。他去世于1143年3月20日在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓享年40岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾吉斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Slavic brus ‘whetstone’, presumably a metonymic occupational name for someone who honed or sharpened blades; possibly also a nickname for a clumsy or coarse fellow. Compare Bruss .
Slovenian: from an old dialect short form of the personal name Ambrož (see Ambrose ). Compare Bruss .
French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, from Occitan brusc ‘heather’, or a habitational name from (Le/Les) Brus, the name of several places in southern France.

variants.name: Bruss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Eldor, Reinhard, Rudie, Wilhelm.
German (also Brüss): from a short form of the medieval personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).
Americanized or Germanized form of Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic)   Brus  , meaning ‘whetstone’ and, as a Slovenian name, also ‘Ambrose’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland was born in 1103, in Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton, was 41 and his mother, Agnes de Surdeval, was 33. He had at least 4 sons with Agnes d’Aumâle. He died on 20 March 1143, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland est né en 1103, à Skelton Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Surdeval, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Agnes d’Aumâle. Il est décédé le 20 mars 1143, à Skelton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Guisborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England: Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland 1103 in Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton 41 und seine Mutter Agnes de Surdeval 33. Er hatte mit Agnes d’Aumâle mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 20. März 1143 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Skelton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland è nato il nel 1103 nel Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Surdeval, aveva 33 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Agnes d’Aumâle. Morì il 20 marzo 1143, nel Skelton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Clevelandが1103年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトン カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skeltonは41歳，母Agnes de Surdevalは33歳であった。彼はAgnes d’Aumâleとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1143年3月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンで40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアグイスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland(이)가 1103년 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Surdeval(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Agnes d’Aumâle(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1143년 3월 20일 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 길스버루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland nasceu em 1103, em Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Surdeval, tinha 33 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Agnes d’Aumâle. Ele faleceu em 20 de março de 1143, em Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland родился в 1103 г. в местности скелтон кастл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Surdeval, 33. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Agnes d’Aumâle. Он умер 20 марта 1143 г. в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности гуисбороую, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam de Brus Lord of Skelton, Lord of Cleveland nació en 1103, en Skelton Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert De Bruce 1st Lord of Annandale 1st Lord Skelton, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Agnes de Surdeval, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Agnes d’Aumâle. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1143, en Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
